_doc: Kalshi auto-trading risk parameters and feature flags.
Secrets (API key ID + private key) are NEVER stored here — they live in
All caps default to safe values; raise gradually as confidence builds.
auto_trading_enabled_doc: Master kill switch. Default false. When false, Phase 3 order-placement
runs are skipped entirely. Even when true, individual safety caps below
still apply. Flip to true ONLY after Phase 2 dry-run mode has been
environment_doc: Note: env var KALSHI_ENVIRONMENT (set to 'live' in workflows by
default) takes precedence over this field. Field is kept for
consistency / local testing without env vars set.
min_calibrated_score_doc: Only auto-place picks at calibrated score ≥ this value. Empirically:
Set high to start (only chase the sharpest signal). Lower if you want
supported_bet_types_doc: What bet types are eligible for LIVE auto-placement (real money).
Currently ML only. Spread/total need their own Kalshi market mapping
logic and have separate considerations. See paper_supported_bet_types
paper_supported_bet_types_doc: What bet types are tracked in the PAPER (simulated, never placed)
performance track. Set to ['ou'] so O/U picks get graded against
actual outcomes for model validation without risking real money.
Once the paper track shows consistent profitable hit rate ≥52.4%,
we can promote a bet type from paper → supported_bet_types and the
auto-pipeline starts placing it for real.
paper_min_calibrated_score_doc: Cal-score floor for paper-track picks — separate from the live
min_calibrated_score gate. Set lower (50 = essentially any pick the
model produces) so we accumulate paper samples fast for validation.
Live bets need 65+ confidence to be worth real money risk; paper
bets just need to be above coin-flip (50).
max_stake_per_pick_dollars_doc: Hard cap on a single order, regardless of Kelly recommendation.
Initial Phase 3 launch is at $5 — small enough that a bad week is
single-digit % of bankroll. Raise to $10 → $25 → $50 over weeks if
max_daily_exposure_dollars_doc: Sum across all auto-placed orders in one ET day. New orders skip if
this would be exceeded. With $5/pick × 4 = $20, this lets the typical
1-3 daily picks fire fully but caps blow-up days. Raise alongside
kelly_fraction_doc: Fractional Kelly multiplier. 1.0 = full Kelly (max growth, max
bankroll_doc: Reference bankroll for Kelly stake calculation. Update manually when
you deposit/withdraw. Phase 3+ may auto-sync from Kalshi balance.
kill_switch_daily_loss_doc: If yesterday's reconciled PnL was below -$25, place_orders.py refuses
to place ANY orders today. Auto-resets the next day if PnL recovers.
With $20/day max exposure, a -$25 day means we lost more than today's
planned exposure — clear signal to pause and review.
skip_if_yes_ask_above_cents_doc: Don't place if the YES side asking price is ≥ this many cents (≥80%
implied probability). Even on heavy favorites, low edge × high
